# seerr_notification_agents (Data Source)

Get information about all configured notification agents in Seerr.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `agents` (Attributes List) List of notification agents. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--agents))
- `id` (String) Placeholder ID for the data source.

<a id="nestedatt--agents"></a>
### Nested Schema for `agents`

Read-Only:

- `agent` (String) The name of the agent (e.g., discord, slack, email).
- `embed_poster` (Boolean) Whether to embed poster images in notifications.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the agent is enabled.
